title: Energized Power - The Aether
description: Compatibility between Energized Power and The Aether
body:
Compatibility between Energized Power and The Aether

## Information

**This mod requires [Energized Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/energized-power) and [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)**

**The fabric edition of this mod requires the Fabric API.**

*Feel free to include this mod in your ModPack :-)*
